findings.summary: Stopped after improve phase instead of chaining to queue execution — user had to nudge twice
findings.evidence: User messages: 'ok continue then? why did you stop?' after improve phase completed with executable queue items remaining
findings.proposed_fix: Internalize research-cycle 'chain confidently' rule — never stop between phases when queue has executable items

findings.summary: 12 individual gnomAD MCP lookups returned ~40K tokens of unused subpopulation data for keloid panel verification
findings.evidence: 4+4 parallel population_variant_frequency calls, each returning full HGDP/1KG breakdown when only NFE AF needed
findings.proposed_fix: MCP tool enhancement proposal: add field filtering to population_variant_frequency. Interim: note in dispatch prompts to use MyVariant.info batch POST for >5 variants
